name: Burnett Transit
districts_or_customers: Local Spencer/Marathon/Clark/Wood County WI school districts
recent_news: Active independent family operator since 1954; profile coverage in Central Wisconsin News (2022) on multi-generational rural bus operation. No M&A signals found.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (70+ yr) family-run rural WI operator with school + charter mix; potential succession/tuck-in candidate though small in scale (likely <30 buses). Note: the Dorchester listing in source data appears to be a satellite garage/route; primary HQ is Spencer, WI.

name: Spartan Bus Line LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Baker Public Schools (Baker, MT; mascot 'Spartans')
recent_news: PPP loan from Dacotah Bank, retained 6 jobs (2020-2021). FMCSA-registered since 2003 as interstate passenger carrier. No M&A activity.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~6 buses) rural eastern MT operator; too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own and far outside Summit's core footprint. Possible micro-roll only.

name: Vw Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Unconfirmed; Helena Public Schools contracts with First Student, not Vw Bus LLC
recent_news: No web presence located. Helena's principal school-bus contractor is confirmed to be First Student (EQT-owned strategic), so Vw Bus LLC is at most a marginal sub-contractor or individual-transportation-contract holder.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as a real school-bus contractor; name suggests possible Volkswagen-bus novelty/charter entity. Almost certainly not a Summit tuck-in. Recommend deprioritize pending Delaware-style entity confirmation.

name: Robert R Weymouth Inc
districts_or_customers: RSU 68 / SeDoMoCha (Dover-Foxcroft, Charleston, Monson, Sebec ME)
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier since Sept 1998 (DOT #771810); Malcolm Weymouth personally drives Bus D for RSU 68 (Puddledock/Rt 11/Bacon/Rt 15/Garland Rd routes). No M&A signals.
fit_notes: Micro family owner-operator (3 buses) servicing one rural Maine RSU; succession-rich profile but far too small to be a stand-alone tuck-in. Only relevant in a multi-Maine-contractor roll-up.

name: Novel Advantage Bus Resources
districts_or_customers: Unconfirmed; address (Ocean View, DE 19970) is in Indian River SD footprint, Sussex County
recent_news: No web, DOE-contractor-listing, or news hits located. Delaware School Bus Contractors Association directory exists but did not surface this name in search results.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as an operating school-bus contractor; residential-address LLC with no digital footprint suggests at most a 1-2 bus owner-operator under DE's independent-contractor model. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target on a standalone basis.
